text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm searching the school for Tazuna,<n>thinking it
might be nice to invite her<n>out, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Are you listening?! We must handlethis posthaste!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Personal space! Our faces are almost<n>touching,
Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear an uncharacteristically<n>angry—yet
familiar—voice from around<n>the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I hurry over to see what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Pardon my manners, but this is a<n>serious
situation, Director Akikawa!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Academy infirmary is an<n>important
lifeline for our Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But it can't fulfill that role if it isn't<n>fully equipped.
Running out of<n>essential equipment is
unacceptable!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed! I wholeheartedly agree with<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, the fact that there was an<n>accident
during shipping is out of our<n>control! I've already
arranged for a<n>new delive—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But a delivery later is no use to<n>students who
need the facilities today!<n>Surely—

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Silence!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Tazuna. Yes, the<n>shipment has been
delayed, but we<n>still have ample supplies in
reserve.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The students will get nervous if they<n>see you
acting like this. For their<n>sakes, I suggest you
take a walk to<n>cool down.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
M-my apologies... Yes, that... sounds<n>like a good
idea.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Tazuna trudges away, and I rush<n>after her.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Did you happen to... witness that just<n>now?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... How embarrassing. I lost my<n>composure
back there.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've seen all kinds of racers here at<n>Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, some do amazing in the<n>Twinkle
Series and then go on to the<n>Dream Trophy
League, but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There are only a few racers like that.<n>Most
aren't so lucky.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Many lose the ability to perform at<n>their best,
either due to injury or<n>accident.
choice_data_list: So that's why you were so frantic.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Most of our students love running so<n>much that
they've dedicated their<n>lives to it by coming here.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So the despair they feel when they<n>find out
they'll never feel the wind in<n>their faces again...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It's absolutely dreadful...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: With that, Tazuna falls silent.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As we stand there, we can hear<n>students training
in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'm cooled off now!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'd better get back to work.<n>Sorry for
worrying you! I'll—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I just tripped, that's all.<n>How clumsy of
me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though she puts on a smile, it's clear<n>her ankle
is hurt.
choice_data_list: Let me take care of that!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No, that's not necessary!<n>Really!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her protests, I treat Tazuna's<n>ankle with
the medical equipment I<n>always have on me.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... As expected, your first<n>aid skills
are exemplary...
choice_data_list: I am a trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's true...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It feels very... reassuring having you<n>around,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I might even be a little jealous of your<n>trainee...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, that was a joke! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for taking care of me! If<n>it's all right,
I'd like to repay the favor.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So let's go out for a meal again. On<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tazuna and I decide to go to<n>our usual
ramen spot.
